calc_settings_pct_range.name: calc_settings_pct_range
calc_settings_pct_range.value: energy_valcovna_pct BETWEEN 0 AND 100 AND energy_lisovna_pct BETWEEN 0 AND 100

lab_test_definitions_some_limit.name: lab_test_definitions_some_limit
lab_test_definitions_some_limit.value: min_value IS NOT NULL OR max_value IS NOT NULL

lab_test_definitions_min_lte_max.name: lab_test_definitions_min_lte_max
lab_test_definitions_min_lte_max.value: min_value IS NULL OR max_value IS NULL OR min_value <= max_value

lab_tests_one_open_per_batch_uq.name: lab_tests_one_open_per_batch_uq
lab_tests_one_open_per_batch_uq.where: verdict IS NULL AND deleted_at IS NULL

lab_tests_verdict_signed.name: lab_tests_verdict_signed
lab_tests_verdict_signed.value: (verdict IS NULL) = (verdict_by IS NULL) AND (verdict IS NULL) = (verdict_at IS NULL)

receipts_faktura_requires_invoice.name: receipts_faktura_requires_invoice
receipts_faktura_requires_invoice.value: source <> 'faktura' OR invoice_id IS NOT NULL

stock_moves_sign_by_type.name: stock_moves_sign_by_type
stock_moves_sign_by_type.value:
(move_type = 'prijem' AND qty_delta > 0)
        OR (move_type = 'vydaj' AND qty_delta < 0)
        OR (move_type = 'korekcia' AND qty_delta <> 0)

stock_moves_vydaj_requires_batch.name: stock_moves_vydaj_requires_batch
stock_moves_vydaj_requires_batch.value: move_type <> 'vydaj' OR batch_id IS NOT NULL

stock_moves_korekcia_has_target.name: stock_moves_korekcia_has_target
stock_moves_korekcia_has_target.value: move_type <> 'korekcia' OR batch_id IS NOT NULL OR cost_center_id IS NOT NULL

stock_moves_adjustment_requires_batch.name: stock_moves_adjustment_requires_batch
stock_moves_adjustment_requires_batch.value: adjustment_id IS NULL OR batch_id IS NOT NULL

suppliers_ico_uq.name: suppliers_ico_uq
suppliers_ico_uq.where: deleted_at IS NULL AND ico IS NOT NULL AND ico <> ''

work_orders_prep_branch_allowed.name: work_orders_prep_branch_allowed
work_orders_prep_branch_allowed.value: prep_branch IS NULL OR prep_branch IN ('barwell', 'sekanie')
